summary: Hold the AdaptiveLimiter mutex across the sleep and the lastRequest update so concurrent workers actually queue.
reason: The prior Wait() dropped the lock before sleeping and only re-took it to write lastRequest. When sync ran with --concurrency N every worker read the same stale lastRequest, slept for the same duration, then fired the same instant; the limiter produced bursts of N requests rather than spacing them at 1/rate (greptile P1).
